text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship and Winning Ticket board a train to
test their mettle as "normies." All they have to do
is behave like normal passengers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, they just can't do it. It's a tough
world out there. But the test is not for naught, for
Gold Ship comes to an important realization:
dolphins must never be mistaken for fish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship hears a voice in her dreams yet again.
Though it reminds her of Mejiro McQueen, there's
something slightly different...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's scent reminds Gold Ship of the
tatami mats at her grandfather's, but the voice in
her dreams makes her think of dirty socks.
